data.description:
One explanation has survived the criteria of several distinct problems: (pi-design) Produce a DESIGN SPECIFICATION for this website:
Create a single self-contained webpage about the wonders of DNA. Make it eye-catching, modern and artistic, wit; (pi-plan) Write a PRODUCT PLAN for this website: Create a single self-contained webpage about the wonders of DNA. Make it eye-catching, modern and artistic, with rich mot; (succ:14b980356ae2) supersede refuted candidate 14b980356ae2 on pi-plan. Original problem: Write a PRODUCT PLAN for this website: Create a single self-contained webpage about the w; (succ:48ba898d5180) supersede refuted candidate 48ba898d5180 on pi-plan. Original problem: Write a PRODUCT PLAN for this website: Create a single self-contained webpage about the w. Conjecture the deeper account: what SINGLE explanation of the underlying subject matter covers all of these domains, and what does it predict that the narrower explanations do not? Each candidate MUST be an explanation of the subject matter itself - never commentary on, or a review of, any existing artifact or explanation.
